title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 515.050 - Oath of referees
text:
515.050.  Oath of referees. — Before proceeding to hear any testimony in the cause, they shall take and subscribe an oath before some officer duly authorized to administer an oath, faithfully and fairly to hear and examine the cause, and to make a just, impartial and true report, according to the best of their understanding, which oath shall be filed and returned with the award.
(RSMo 1939 § 1147) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 981; 1919 § 1431; 1909 § 2001
